scripts.lint: biome check --formatter-enabled=false --linter-enabled=true --assist-enabled=false astro.config.mjs package.json tsconfig.json biome.json src/env.d.ts
scripts.format:check: biome check --formatter-enabled=true --linter-enabled=false --assist-enabled=false astro.config.mjs package.json tsconfig.json biome.json src/env.d.ts
scripts.validate: bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run typecheck && bun run test:validation
